table_description: Log of plan upgrades, downgrades, and cancellations with MRR impact.
use_cases: Calculate net revenue retention (expansion - contraction - churn)
Analyze MRR movement (new, expansion, contraction, churn)
data_quality_notes: MRR delta = new_mrr - previous_mrr (negative for downgrades and cancellations)
Cancellation reasons are NOT in this table — use subscriptions.cancellation_reason instead

table_columns.name: new_plan
table_columns.description: Plan after change — NULL for cancellations
